args: set -e; ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)}"; BIN="$ROOT/target/release/ai-architect-mcp"; if [ ! -x "$BIN" ]; then "$ROOT/bin/ensure-binary.sh" verbose >&2 || true; fi; if [ ! -x "$BIN" ]; then echo "ai-architect-mcp: FATAL — binary missing after ensure-binary.sh; build manually with: cargo build --release --manifest-path \"$ROOT/Cargo.toml\"" >&2; exit 1; fi; exec "$BIN"
